title: Skill Discovery, Trigger Descriptions, and Boundaries · Design Defense
summary: Make explicit and implicit invocation reliable without false positives. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a trigger evaluation dataset. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Front-load use cases and trigger terms in a concise skill description.
Write diverse prompts that should activate the skill.
Write adjacent prompts that must not activate the skill.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
